What is Python used for
Python is used for web development, data analysis, artificial intelligence, and more.
Is Python hard to learn
Python is considered one of the easiest programming languages to learn for beginners.
How long does it take to learn Python
Most beginners can learn basic Python in 3-6 months with consistent practice.
Is Python free
Yes, Python is completely free and open source.
